task_updates.executor_notes:
Final cross-repo verification was executed as far as the environment and unresolved upstream blockers allowed, and the gate is not clean. Passing checks: `runpod-lifecycle` re-test exited 0 with `50 passed, 1 warning` (only a `PytestCacheWarning` from sandboxed `.pytest_cache` writes); `reigh-worker-orchestrator` re-test exited 0 with `71 passed, 2 warnings` and no `AttributeError` or `coroutine was never awaited` warnings; orchestrator `grep -r 'from gpu_orchestrator.runpod' --include='*.py' .` returned only the expected `startup_script` imports in `gpu_orchestrator/worker_spawner.py` and `tests/gpu_orchestrator/runpod/test_startup_script.py`; orchestrator `rg -n 'create_runpod_client|RunpodClient' . -g '*.py'` returned no matches. The throwaway async-contract reproduction script was created at `/tmp/runpod_async_contract_check.py`, initially failed with `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'gpu_orchestrator'`, was fixed by prepending the orchestrator repo root to `sys.path`, then passed (`PASS`), and was deleted.

The remaining required invariants fail or are blocked. `cd /Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-worker && pytest -q` failed during collection with `72 errors, 3 skipped`; representative failures include `ModuleNotFoundError` for `source`, `PIL`, `torch`, `cv2`, `scripts`, and `debug`, plus multiple `AttributeError: module 'numpy' has no attribute 'ndarray'`. Reigh-worker grep gates are still dirty: `grep -r 'gpu_orchestrator.runpod' --include='*.py' .` returns hits in `scripts/live_test/variant_update.py`, `scripts/live_test/config.py`, `scripts/live_test/tests/test_primitives.py`, `scripts/live_test/__init__.py`, `scripts/live_test/variant_fresh.py`, `debug/commands/storage.py`, and `tests/test_debug_commands.py`; `rg -n 'create_runpod_client|RunpodClient' . -g '*.py'` also returns multiple hits in `debug/commands/storage.py`, `scripts/live_test/config.py`, `scripts/live_test/variant_update.py`, `scripts/live_test/tests/test_primitives.py`, and `tests/test_debug_commands.py`. Neither consumer dependency file is pinned: `gpu_orchestrator/requirements.txt` has no `runpod-lifecycle @ git+https://github.com/banodoco/runpod-lifecycle@v0.1.0` entry, and `reigh-worker/pyproject.toml` has no `runpod-lifecycle` dependency entry. `gh repo view ... && gh api .../tags` failed with `error connecting to api.github.com`, so the public repo/tag could not be verified. `git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD` is empty in both consumer repos; orchestrator is on local `runpod-lifecycle-migration` with uncommitted/staged work only, while reigh-worker remains on `main`. The history secret spot-check `git log -p --all | grep -iE 'RUNPOD_API_KEY|SUPABASE_SERVICE|sk-' | head` returned matches in both repos, so I cannot certify the requested no-secrets-in-history invariant from this session. Because T2, T11, T12, and T13 remain unresolved or blocked, the overall T14 gate remains blocked rather than passing cleanly.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Not satisfied. `runpod-lifecycle` and orchestrator test suites are green, and the async-contract reproduction script passed and was deleted, but the final gate still fails on required invariants: `reigh-worker` fails `pytest -q` during collection with 72 errors; its `gpu_orchestrator.runpod` and `create_runpod_client`/`RunpodClient` grep gates are still dirty; neither consumer dependency file is pinned to the intended tag; `gh repo view`/tag verification could not run because the environment could not reach `api.github.com`; `git log origin/main..HEAD` is empty in both consumer repos; and the history secret spot-check returned matches.
